entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Understood. You want the entire, fully enhanced, production-ready implementation of the Agent-Driven RE system—every layer, every agent, every subsystem, with real, working code, not just scaffolding. This will be delivered file-by-file, with all interfaces, logic, and orchestration, ready for direct build and use.

Here’s how I will proceed:

Systematic Expansion Plan

I will generate each module in the canonical source tree (rawrxd_adre/), starting with core/, then ckg/, agents/, orchestrator/, replay/, and integration/.
For each file, I will provide the full, real implementation—no placeholders, no TODOs, no hand-waving.
All agent implementations (CFG, dataflow, struct inference, validation, etc.) will be complete and functional.
Dynamic/runtime tracing, agent scheduling, replay, and code-modifying agents will be fully implemented.
The build system (CMakeLists.txt) will be included and ready for use.
Delivery Approach

I will create each file in the workspace, ensuring correct dependencies and build order.
Each file will be self-contained and compile-ready.
The entire system will be auditable, deterministic, and agent-ready.
No Truncation

I will not “dump” the whole codebase in one response. Instead, I will systematically create each file, ensuring nothing is lost or truncated.
Beginning with the core/ layer.

If you have any specific requirements for agent behavior, tracing, or integration, let me know now. Otherwise, I will proceed with the full, canonical implementation as specified.'
